story_title: Strait of Hormuz / Project Freedom paused
story_one_liner: The US and Iran are 48 hours from signing a one-page memo to end the war. Same news, five very different stories about who actually won.
music_brief: subtle tension; drop out at frame 8 closer
voiceover_provider: ElevenLabs Creator tier or Azure Neural TTS

scenes.voiceover: Same news. Five very different stories. Today: the Strait of Hormuz.
scenes.visual_brief: Cold open. Black. Tap-tap of breaking news. Cut to satellite shot of the Hormuz strait with dots representing trapped tankers.

scenes.voiceover: The US and Iran are 48 hours from a one-page memo to end the war. Pakistan brokered. Brent crude crashed eleven percent. Now: how five countries told the same story.
scenes.visual_brief: Map zooms out, five country pins illuminate with subtle pulse. Headlines flicker at the bottom in five languages.

scenes.voiceover: United States. Trump on Truth Social: "the legendary Epic Fury will be at an end... if they don't agree, the bombing starts at a much higher level and intensity than before."
scenes.visual_brief: American flag overlay. Quote card with Truth Social styling. Cut to file footage of Trump at podium.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇺🇸 USA: 'If they don't agree, the bombing starts'
Trump, Truth Social
scenes.headline_quoted: Trump warns 'much higher-level' bombing will start if Iran does not agree to a deal — Yonhap News, citing Truth Social

scenes.voiceover: China. Foreign Minister Wang Yi: "blocking the Strait of Hormuz would not serve the common interests of the international community." Beijing is positioning itself as the mediator a week before Trump visits.
scenes.visual_brief: Chinese flag overlay. Wang Yi shaking hands with UAE envoy (stock). Map graphic showing China's diplomatic moves.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇨🇳 CHINA: 'Blockade not in common interests'
Wang Yi, CGTN
scenes.headline_quoted: Wang Yi: Blockade of Strait of Hormuz not in common interests — CGTN World

scenes.voiceover: Russia. RT's Rick Sanchez: "the reality in the Strait contradicts US claims. Tehran still holds the strategic edge."
scenes.visual_brief: Russian flag overlay. Cut to footage of Iranian IRGC vessel. Quote card with RT styling.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇷🇺 RUSSIA: 'Tehran still holds the strategic edge'
RT
scenes.headline_quoted: Mapping Hormuz: RT's Rick Sanchez on strategic edge — RT

scenes.voiceover: Iran. Republic World, India: Iran's president "deeming Iranian compliance impossible." Iran wants to charge tolls. World leaders call it illegal.
scenes.visual_brief: Iranian flag overlay. Cut to footage of Pezeshkian. Map showing Iran's proposed toll-zone.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇮🇷 IRAN: 'Compliance impossible'
Pezeshkian, via Republic World
scenes.headline_quoted: US-Iran War LIVE: Trump Issues Another Ultimatum to Tehran — Republic World

scenes.voiceover: And the country that brokered it. Sydney Morning Herald: "the war's only peace talks were hosted by Pakistan, which has continued in that role of mediator, ferrying proposals between the sides."
scenes.visual_brief: Pakistani flag overlay. Cut to FM Dar at podium. Headline card from Dawn.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇵🇰 PAKISTAN: 'Ferrying proposals between the sides'
Sydney Morning Herald, citing Pakistani sources

scenes.voiceover: Same memo. Five different victors. Now you know.
scenes.visual_brief: Five flags fan into frame. End card with channel handle.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Same news. Five stories.
Daily framings. Follow.

fact_check_provenance.primary_event_source: Pakistani diplomatic source via Reuters, confirmed by Axios

supporting_quotes_per_frame.exact_headline: Trump warns 'much higher-level' bombing will start if Iran does not agree to a deal
Wang Yi: Blockade of Strait of Hormuz not in common interests
Mapping Hormuz: RT's Rick Sanchez on strategic edge
US-Iran War LIVE: Trump Issues Another Ultimatum to Tehran, Threatens Heightened Military
US and Iran closing in on 'one-page memo' to end war, sources say
